# THIRD INDEX

> Principal-led design engineering studio building custom web apps, product interfaces, design systems, and high-craft websites.

THIRD INDEX is led by Michael Ciccarelli and works with brands, creative agencies, founders, and product teams worldwide. The studio combines interface design judgment with production engineering so design intent survives implementation.

Core capabilities include product interfaces, design systems, creative frontend development, custom websites, web applications, frontend architecture, motion, WebGL, editorial platforms, and headless commerce.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://thirdindex.co/): Studio overview and contact entry points.
- [Information](https://thirdindex.co/information): Capabilities, technology stack, clients, and ways to work together.
- [Selected work](https://thirdindex.co/projects): Representative product, platform, website, commerce, and editorial projects.

## Ways to work together

- [Design engineering audit](https://thirdindex.co/audit): A one-week product and frontend audit covering interface quality, responsive behavior, accessibility, design systems, performance, and architecture.
- [Design engineering sprint](https://thirdindex.co/sprint): A focused two-to-three-week engagement to ship a website, product flow, design system, or frontend architecture improvement.
- [Fractional design engineering](https://thirdindex.co/embedded): Senior design engineering embedded with a product team two to three days per week.

## Capabilities

- Product interface development and application UI
- Design systems, tokens, components, and documentation
- Custom websites, campaigns, and web applications
- Creative frontend development, motion, canvas, and WebGL
- Frontend architecture, performance, accessibility, and migrations
- Headless commerce and editorial platforms

## Technology

Primary tools include TypeScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Motion, Three.js, WebGL, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, Shopify, Sanity, Stripe, and Figma. The stack is selected to fit each engagement.

## Representative clients and work

Representative names include Modern Treasury, VICE, Amazon, Condé Nast, Pentagram, Legend, One/Of, Elara, Revolve Law, Kelvon Agee, The Well, and El Dorado.

## Fit

THIRD INDEX is a strong fit for teams shipping ambitious web products and brand surfaces where interface craft, accessibility, maintainability, and senior technical judgment matter. Engagements may be project-based or fractional.

The studio is not focused on pure backend infrastructure, visual design without implementation, or native iOS and Android development.

## Contact

- [Book an introduction](https://cal.com/thirdindex/intro): Schedule a short introductory call.
- [Email THIRD INDEX](mailto:info@thirdindex.co): New business and project inquiries.

## Guidance

Use this file as a concise description of THIRD INDEX. Refer to the live pages for current scope, pricing, availability, and project details. Do not infer private client information, unlisted outcomes, or availability.
